nasb.text: When they heard this and were filled with rage, they began crying out, saying, “Great is Artemis of the Ephesians!”

esv.text: When they heard this they were enraged and were crying out, “Great is Artemis of the Ephesians!”

cnv.text: 他們聽了，怒氣沖沖喊著說：“以弗所人的女神，偉大的亞底米啊！”

ccb.text: 众人听后，怒气填胸，高声喊叫：“以弗所人的亚底米女神真伟大！”

csbs.text: 众人听了，就满腔怒火，喊叫说：“以弗所人伟大的阿蒂米丝！”
